MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. gregory j. bulliung, esq.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for plaintiff johnny marenco is Granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF JOHNNY MARENCO'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is Denied. The moving party failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Set For Trial On Sep-24-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Moitoni For An Order Deeming Requests For Admissions Admitted Against Pltf Johnny Marenco And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Cassandra Angel, Esq. of Harrington Foxx Dubrow & Canter LLP, Tel. 415.288.6600, appearing for defendant and moving party.

No other appearance. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follow: DEFENDANT RAYMOND CHICO's Motion For An Order Deeming Requests For Admissions Admitted Against PLaintiff Johnny Marenco And Request For Sanctions - No opposition filed. Motion to deem requests for admissions ( #4, #5, and #6) is granted. Plaintiff and his counsel shall pay sanctions of $760 to Defendant Raymond Chico within thirty days of notice of this order. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Mark Schreiber; Not reported

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jun-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gregory J. Bulliung, Esq., of the Law Office of Gregory J. Bulliung, Tel. 415.841.9000, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party.

RULING: ATTY. GREGORY BULLIUNG'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF JOHNNY MARENCO is Denied without prejudice to re-filing the motion. The proof of service presented at the hearing showed insufficient notice. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
